content:
# Soil Moisture

**Summary**: The amount of water in the soil.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2019]] modeled soil moisture to isolate its effect on GRACE TWS signals.

## Scientific Context

- [[2019-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2019]] Necessary to isolate groundwater from total TWS signals.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2019-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2019]] Simulated using three different Land Surface Models (Noah, VIC, and Mosaic).

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Soil moisture variations were found not to significantly affect TWS in this region. ([[2019-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2019, p. 49]])
